tweets.text:
🎥Watch our at-large arrest of Guatemalan criminal alien Miguel Tamup-Tamup May 15.

You may remember him from the early-release photos — he’s responsible for breaking an ICE agent’s leg during an earlier apprehension attempt.  
 
📢ICE officers risk their lives to protect the American public and enforce our laws. If an ICE agent tries to apprehend you, don’t resist, fight or flee.

Ultimately, you’ll still be arrested — but you’ll also face criminal charges.

author.description: Protects America through criminal investigations and by enforcing immigration law to preserve national security and public safety.  https://t.co/rDI2IeFofc

tweets.text:
📷Compare these photos of two ICE arrests.

One shows us escorting an illegal alien from a jail after arresting him in a safe, controlled environment. The jail turned him over to us after we obtained a criminal arrest warrant.

The other shows us arresting an illegal alien at-large after officials from a county jail released him into the community — despite our request for them to hold him following his conviction.

Although no jurisdiction can refuse to honor a criminal arrest warrant, sanctuary jurisdictions regularly refuse to honor ICE immigration detainers — even when the alien is a convicted criminal.

Refusing to honor ICE detainers puts the public and our law enforcement at greater risk. As you can see from these photos, it also forces us to use greater resources — and taxpayer dollars!

💻Learn more about detainers on our website.

tweets.text:
✈️International fugitive deported:

ICE Boston removed Brazilian convict Juliano Araujo Dos Santos Silva from the United States and turned him over to Brazilian authorities.

After his conviction for armed robbery in his home nation, he was supposed to serve more than five years in prison but fled to the United States as a fugitive.

He tried to evade justice in Woonsocket, R.I., but we found and arrested him earlier this year.

📰Learn more: https://t.co/6clp6Ib6IF

tweets.text:
NEWARK, N.J. — An ICE-led investigation helped put a former New Jersey Department of Children and Family Services caseworker Trent Collier behind bars for nine years for possessing and transporting sexual abuse material depicting toddlers.

He also faces additional charges for sexually abusing two children.

🔎Did you know that one of ICE’s major responsibilities includes child exploitation investigations? We target sexual predators, child sex abusers and child sex tourists.

📰Learn more about this case: https://t.co/qBcHUTTxTe

💻Learn more about ICE Cyber Crimes Center: https://t.co/HLhD7Umv0b

author.description: Protects America through criminal investigations and by enforcing immigration law to preserve national security and public safety.  https://t.co/rDI2IeFofc

tweets.text:
Alex Yonatan Flores-Arce is a CONVICTED RAPIST and criminal Honduran alien.

We lodged an immigration detainer against him with Howard County, Md., Jan. 13. In other words, we asked them not to release him into the public because we planned to arrest him on immigration violations.

The events of the past several months are SHOCKING, but they show the struggles ICE faces dealing with sanctuary jurisdictions:

Oct. 17, 2024 | Howard County police arrested and charged Flores with second-degree rape.
April 29, 2025 | The Howard County circuit court convicted him & the judge sentenced him to 15 years of confinement plus five years of supervised probation.

May 5 – 22, 2025 | Howard County released him into the public, then arrested him again for probation violation and released him again from custody!
Fortunately, ICE Baltimore’s fugitive operations team arrested him AT-LARGE as he walked out of the jail May 22.

He has a final removal order now and is no longer a risk to the community.
💻Learn more about detainers: https://t.co/JwpLl6wLbK

📰Learn more about this case: https://t.co/PMEGHqLGZA

tweets.text:
🎥SAN JUAN, Puerto Rico — ICE agents arrested 30 illegal aliens May 25 with support from the FBI, DEA, ATF, U.S. Marshals and DSS.

Watch our operation unfold as we brought down an illegal cockfighting ring located within the U.S. territory. In addition to animal cruelty, cockfighting rings are often linked to drug trafficking, illegal gambling and organized crime.

📢The Trump administration has a zero-tolerance policy for illegal immigration, including:
• Violating the terms of a legitimate visa
• Illegal entry
• Overstaying a visa
• Misusing a legal status

If you fall into any of these categories — leave now or expect an ICE arrest.

💻https://t.co/coP2gISTsf

tweets.text:
GRAPEVINE, Texas — We arrested two illegal aliens following a deadly jet ski accident that killed 18-year-old Ava Moore near the Lake Grapevine shoreline of Oak Grove Park May 25.
🔎With support from our state, federal and local partners, we arrested 22-year-old Venezuelan illegal alien Daikerlyn Alejandraa Gonzalez-Gonzalez May 27.
She’s charged with felony manslaughter after allegedly operating a jet ski at a high rate of speed after colliding with and killing Moore who was kayaking at the time of the collision.

Gonzalez’s jet ski passenger remained on the scene with witnesses and provided a statement to local police. Meanwhile, Gozalez fled in a vehicle with her boyfriend, 21-year-old Venezuelan alien Maikel Coello-Perozo.

Coello-Perozo was charged with obstructing the arrest of his girlfriend. Both aliens are in removal proceedings because they were living in the United States illegally.

Details: https://t.co/khR89eS7YK

Visit http://ICE.gov/287g  to partner with us.

card.name: summary
card.title: Partner With ICE Through the 287(g) Program

author.description: Protects America through criminal investigations and by enforcing immigration law to preserve national security and public safety.  https://t.co/rDI2IeFofc

tweets.text:
If you’re illegally present — sooner or later — ICE will arrest you. 
Would you rather leave
⌛Unexpectedly after an ICE arrest?
🚗On your own terms?
Learn more: https://t.co/ZJmz9Kl8Cz https://t.co/dTFM8ksP2D
